state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-10 — massive session. 11 decisions (gad-95→gad-107), 5 new skills, 4 eval projects, self-eval pipeline, site fixes + shadcn.
=== SKILLS CREATED THIS SESSION === 1. trace-analysis (.agents/skills/) — analyze .gad-log/ trace data 2. self-eval (.agents/skills/) — score GAD development rounds 3. gad-skill-creator (.agents/skills/) — create GAD-tailored skills using Anthropic skill-creator methodology + GAD CLI/artifacts 4. eval-skill-install (.agents/skills/) — install skills into eval templates, run with/without comparisons 5. reverse-engineer-eval design (in .claude/private-skills/ → moved concept to evals/)
=== EVAL PROJECTS SCAFFOLDED (via gad eval setup CLI) === 1. reverse-engineer-eval — two targets: grime-time + visualeditor-payloadcms 2. gad-skill-creator-eval — measures skill creation quality 3. eval-skill-install-eval — measures skill installation + comparison workflow
=== DECISIONS (gad-95 through gad-107) === 95: Self-evaluation from real brownfield data 96: Reverse-engineer eval — two-phase methodology 97: trace-analysis + self-eval are public framework skills 98: Remove /gad:join-discord 99: Skills prefer CLI but use judgment — methodology skills valid 100: GAD skill creator from Anthropic base 101: gad data CRUD (DEFERRED per gad-106) 102: Skill creation → immediate eval project + framework labeling 103: Computed trace metrics long-lived, raw logs capped 104: Task-skill-agent attribution as formal tags in artifacts 105: Enhance workflow — review tasks for repetitive patterns → script/CLI/skill 106: Defer gad data CLI — keep it light 107: gad eval --input for skill installation into eval projects
=== SELF-EVAL (real data) === 2403 events | 180 tasks (163 done) | 102 decisions | 18.2% overhead | 80% loop compliance
=== SITE FIXES === ExperimentLog, RoundResults, HoverCard, Mermaid diagrams, shadcn (12 components + tw-animate-css), zustand store, data/*.json, hook error handling, self-eval pipeline with append-only snapshots
=== NEXT SESSION === 1. Build landing page component for self-eval display 2. First reverse-engineer eval run (grime-time target) 3. Make gad:merge-skill and gad:create-skill invokable as slash commands 4. Remove /gad:join-discord 5. Add gad rounds CLI command 6. User plays round 5 builds 7. Playable.tsx + Nav.tsx + RoundResults.tsx refactored by user — respect subcomponent structure 8. Test gad-skill-creator by using it to create the next skill we need
